messages.content: 列出当前目录文件 AND 读取 tsconfig.json

{
  "content": "{
  "$schema": "https://json.schemastore.org/tsconfig",
  "compilerOptions": {
    "allowImportingTsExtensions": true,
    "allowSyntheticDefaultImports": true,
    "declaration": true,
    "declarationMap": true,
    "esModuleInterop": true,
    "experimentalDecorators": true,
    "forceConsistentCasingInFileNames": true,
    "lib": ["DOM", "DOM.Iterable", "ES2023"],
    "module": "ESNext",
    "moduleResolution": "bundler",
    "noEmit": true,
    "noEmitOnError": false,
    "resolveJsonModule": true,
    "skipLibCheck": true,
    "strict": false,
    "strictPropertyInitialization": false,
    "target": "ES2023",
    "useDefineForClassFields": false,
    "jsx": "react-jsx",
    "paths": {
      "@/*": ["./ui/src/*"],
      "@mul-agent/*": ["./mul_agent/*"],
      "@skills/*": ["./skills/*"]
    },
    "baseUrl": "."
  },
  "include": [
    "ui/src/**/*",
    "ui/tests/**/*",
    "src/**/*",
    "mul_agent/**/*.pyi",
    "skills/**/*.ts"
  ],
  "exclude": [
    "node_modules",
    "dist",
    "build",
    ".venv",
    "storage",
    "wang",
    "agents",
    "openclaw",
    "**/*.test.ts",
    "**/*.test.tsx"
  ]
}
",
  "lines": 50,
  "totalLines": 50,
  "from": 1,
  "to": 50,
  "path": "tsconfig.json"
}

**当前目录文件：**

| 目录 | 文件 |
|------|------|
| `.claude`, `.git`, `.github`, `.transcripts`, `agentrx`, `docs`, `extensions`, `git-hooks`, `node_modules`, `openclaw`, `scripts`, `skills`, `src`, `storage`, `tests`, `ui` | `.env.example`, `.gitignore`, `.mcp.json`, `.pre-commit-config.yaml`, `AGENTS.md`, `CHANGELOG.md`, `CLAUDE.md`, `CLEANUP_REPORT.md`, `CONTRIBUTING.md`, `LICENSE`, `mint.json`, `oxfmt.config.json`, `oxlint.json`, `package-lock.json`, `package.json`, `pnpm-lock.yaml`, `pnpm-workspace.yaml`, `pyproject.toml`, `README.md`, `SECURITY.md`, `test_output.txt`, `test.txt`, `tsconfig.json`, `tsconfig.tsbuildinfo`, `VISION.md`, `vitest.config.ts` |

---

**tsconfig.json 内容：**

```json
{
  "$schema": "https://json.schemastore.org/tsconfig",
  "compilerOptions": {
    "allowImportingTsExtensions": true,
    "allowSyntheticDefaultImports": true,
    "declaration": true,
    "declarationMap": true,
    "esModuleInterop": true,
    "experimentalDecorators": true,
    "forceConsistentCasingInFileNames": true,
    "lib": ["DOM", "DOM.Iterable", "ES2023"],
    "module": "ESNext",
    "moduleResolution": "bundler",
    "noEmit": true,
    "noEmitOnError": false,
    "resolveJsonModule": true,
    "skipLibCheck": true,
    "strict": false,
    "strictPropertyInitialization": false,
    "target": "ES2023",
    "useDefineForClassFields": false,
    "jsx": "react-jsx",
    "paths": {
      "@/*": ["./ui/src/*"],
      "@mul-agent/*": ["./mul_agent/*"],
      "@skills/*": ["./skills/*"]
    },
    "baseUrl": "."
  },
  "include": [
    "ui/src/**/*",
    "ui/tests/**/*",
    "src/**/*",
    "mul_agent/**/*.pyi",
    "skills/**/*.ts"
  ],
  "exclude": [
    "node_modules",
    "dist",
    "build",
    ".venv",
    "storage",
    "wang",
    "agents",
    "openclaw",
    "**/*.test.ts",
    "**/*.test.tsx"
  ]
}
```

**主要配置：**
- **Target**: ES2023
- **Module**: ESNext
- **JSX**: react-jsx
- **路径别名**: `@/*` → `ui/src/*`, `@mul-agent/*` → `mul_agent/*`, `@skills/*` → `skills/*`
- **严格模式**: `strict: false`
